name: Death angel
description: Lean, digitigrade, walking on their knuckles, with arms drastically larger than their legs, sharp teeth, blind, hypersensitive hearing, impenitrable armor made of stone-like plates Can raise armor to expose sensitive pink flesh, essential organs and to increase hearing capabilities. Height: 7 feet, Agile, extreme strength, no eyes, is compatible with any species in order to spread its superior genes, eyeless bulletproof, top speed: 80 miles per hour, Weaknesses: High frequencies.
creator: Coolguy1234iguess
